name: siegeengine
description: SiegeEngine — meaning-engine for project architecture. Skills + commands + subagents that draft, review, and approve tiered artifacts (features → requirements → sysarch → comparch → subcomparch → impl → fanin), storing state and bodies in git, queried via a read-only MCP server.
author: swaggerallen

siegeengine.description: Read-only project state + context bundles + validation. Every tool takes a `ref` (branch or sha) as its first parameter.
